title: 有冇人記得Hunger Games入面有首歌Hanging Tree

replies.msg:
https://youtu.be/0Y1EmA2CU04

頭盔：近排發啲夢同段片某啲情節幾似所以先諗起首歌
大家睇下條片 唔知你哋最近有冇都發呢啲夢？

歌詞簡單易記重複
旋律應該唔會咁似嘉年華feel
如果好多人一齊唱應該幾震撼（條片2:00開始）
大家點睇
（利申：講緊成大班人去唱k）


”The Hanging Tree“
(with James Newton Howard)
(from ”The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1“ soundtrack)

Are you, are you
Coming to the tree?
They strung up a man
They say who murdered three
Strange things did happen here
No stranger would it be
If we met at midnight
In the hanging tree

Are you, are you
Coming to the tree?
Where dead man called out
For his love to flee
Strange things did happen here
No stranger would it be
If we met at midnight
In the hanging tree

Are you, are you
Coming to the tree?
Where I told you to run
So we’d both be free
Strange things did happen here
No stranger would it be
If we met at midnight
In the hanging tree

Are you, are you
Coming to the tree?
[Original line:] Wear a necklace of rope
[Line modified for effect:] Wear a necklace of hope
Side by side with me
Strange things did happen here
No stranger would it be
If we met at midnight
In the hanging tree

Are you, are you
Coming to the tree?
Where I told you to run
So we‘d both be free
Strange things did happen here
No stranger would it be
If we met at midnight
In the hanging tree

Are you, are you
Coming to the tree?
They strung up a man
They say who murdered three
Strange things did happen here
No stranger would it be
If we met at midnight
In the hanging tree

Are you, are you
Coming to the tree?
Where dead man called out
For his love to flee
Strange things did happen here
No stranger would it be
If we met at midnight
In the hanging tree
毅進仔，英文歌識閪聽咩

隔離post話唱do you hear the people sing
歌詞都唔易記
有人話用airdrop大法分享歌詞
